tasks.label: gen-admin
tasks.command: goctl api format --dir api/admin/doc/api;goctl api go -api ./api/admin/doc/api/admin.api -dir ./api/admin/

tasks.label: gen-front
tasks.command: goctl api format --dir api/front/doc/api;goctl api go -api ./api/front/doc/api/front.api -dir ./api/front/ --style go_zero

tasks.label: gen-cms
tasks.command: go run ./rpc/cms/gen/generator.go;go run ./rpc/cms/proto/main.go;goctl rpc protoc rpc/cms/cms.proto --go_out=./rpc/cms/ --go-grpc_out=./rpc/cms/ --zrpc_out=./rpc/cms/ -m

tasks.label: gen-oms
tasks.command: go run ./rpc/oms/gen/generator.go;go run ./rpc/oms/proto/main.go;goctl rpc protoc rpc/oms/oms.proto --go_out=./rpc/oms/ --go-grpc_out=./rpc/oms/ --zrpc_out=./rpc/oms/ -m --style go_zero

tasks.label: gen-sys
tasks.command: go run ./rpc/sys/gen/generator.go;go run ./rpc/sys/proto/main.go;goctl rpc protoc rpc/sys/sys.proto --go_out=./rpc/sys/ --go-grpc_out=./rpc/sys/ --zrpc_out=./rpc/sys/ -m

tasks.label: gen-ums
tasks.command: go run ./rpc/ums/gen/generator.go;go run ./rpc/ums/proto/main.go;goctl rpc protoc rpc/ums/ums.proto --go_out=./rpc/ums/ --go-grpc_out=./rpc/ums/ --zrpc_out=./rpc/ums/ -m

tasks.label: gen-pms
tasks.command: go run ./rpc/pms/gen/generator.go;go run ./rpc/pms/proto/main.go;goctl rpc protoc rpc/pms/pms.proto --go_out=./rpc/pms/ --go-grpc_out=./rpc/pms/ --zrpc_out=./rpc/pms/ -m

tasks.label: gen-sms
tasks.command: go run ./rpc/sms/gen/generator.go;go run ./rpc/sms/proto/main.go;goctl rpc protoc rpc/sms/sms.proto --go_out=./rpc/sms/ --go-grpc_out=./rpc/sms/ --zrpc_out=./rpc/sms/ -m --style go_zero

tasks.label: gen-consumer
tasks.command: goctl api format --dir consumer;goctl api go -api ./consumer/consumer.api -dir ./consumer --style go_zero

tasks.label: gen-job
tasks.command: goctl api format --dir job;goctl api go -api ./job/job.api -dir ./job --style go_zero
